hero.title: Unit & Currency Converter
hero.description: Convert everyday measurements and currencies through one fast input-to-result workspace.

differences.title: Keep common conversions in one focused workspace
differences.description: Switch between offline unit calculations and refreshed currency rates without losing the direct conversion workflow.

items.title: Offline units
items.description: Convert common measurements directly in your browser.

items.title: Refreshed currencies
items.description: Fetch current exchange rates when the provider is available.

items.title: Clear results
items.description: Review, swap, and copy converted values quickly.

feel.title: A direct path from amount to result
feel.description: The workspace keeps the amount, conversion choices, rate details, and result connected.

items.title: Choose a mode
items.description: Switch between Units and Currency in the same workspace.

items.title: Adjust the conversion
items.description: Change categories, source values, targets, or swap direction.

items.title: Use the result
items.description: Copy the converted value or refresh the exchange rate.

audiences.title: Who uses Unit & Currency Converter
audiences.description: Useful wherever measurements or exchange values need a quick answer.

items.title: Travelers
items.description: Refresh currency conversions while planning and traveling.

items.title: Students
items.description: Convert measurements across common study categories.

items.title: Everyday users
items.description: Handle practical unit and currency conversions without saved history.

resourceSection.title: Conversion essentials
resourceSection.description: Everything needed for a fast, private input-to-result workflow.

items.title: Unit categories
items.description: Convert length, mass, temperature, area, volume, and time.

items.title: Currency rates
items.description: Refresh supported exchange rates or use clearly labeled reference rates.

items.title: Browser privacy
items.description: Unit calculations stay in your browser and conversion history is not saved.

groupedSection.title: Two conversion modes
groupedSection.description: Use one responsive workspace for measurements and currencies.

items.name: Common categories
items.description: Choose from six practical measurement categories.

items.name: Automatic results
items.description: Results recalculate as the amount or units change.

items.name: Rate refresh
items.description: Request the latest available rate from the exchange-rate provider.

items.name: Reference fallback
items.description: Continue with clearly labeled sample rates when live rates are unavailable.

technicalSection.title: Designed for mixed utility workflows
technicalSection.description: Unit & Currency Converter follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Browser-only unit calculations with no saved history.
Frontend currency-rate lookup with a reference-rate fallback.

finalCta.title: Convert a value now
finalCta.description: Open the converter workspace for fast unit and currency results.
